title: Create Gods
description: Master engineering with the Create Mod, explore endless biomes, and conquer planets. Build, automate, and rise as a Minecraft god.
body:
# Overview
Step into an extraordinary Minecraft experience where creativity, engineering, and exploration combine to offer infinite possibilities. Create Gods centers around the Create Mod and its addons, providing the tools to build and automate like never before. Explore new worlds, master advanced machinery, and rise as a Minecraft god.

## Key Features
Master Engineering with the Create Mod
The Create Mod and its addons form the backbone of this modpack, offering a vast array of mechanical tools and systems. Design complex contraptions, build industrial-scale factories, and automate processes to achieve engineering perfection. Whether you’re crafting simple mechanisms or massive automated systems, the possibilities are limitless.

- ### Explore Endless Biomes
> - Discover a variety of breathtaking landscapes, from lush forests to volcanic wastelands. Each biome is filled with unique resources, challenges, and surprises to fuel your creative journey.
  
- ### Conquer the Cosmos
> - Go beyond the overworld and explore distant planets with their own ecosystems, resources, and mysteries. Travel through space, settle new worlds, and uncover hidden treasures across the galaxy.
  
- ### Progress and Evolve
> - Unlock advanced tools, machinery, and technologies as you grow in power. Shape your surroundings, automate entire worlds, and forge your path to godhood.
  
- ### Endless Creativity
> - The combination of biomes, planets, and engineering mechanics allows you to redefine what’s possible in Minecraft. Build, explore, and innovate without limits.

## Why Play Create Gods?
This modpack is perfect for players who love the challenge of engineering, the thrill of exploration, and the freedom of creative expression. Whether you’re constructing intricate machines, discovering uncharted planets, or crafting your empire, Create Gods delivers a one-of-a-kind experience.
